title: 6Pcs Starfish Drain Cover and Hair Catcher, Star Silicone Drain Protector, Sink Strainer with Suction Cups, Universal Multicolor Drain Sink Plughole Covers Set for Bathroom, Bathtub & Kitchen
features: Universal Hair Catcher for Drains: Tailored for use in standard kitchen sinks, bathroom showers, tubs, and laundry drain systems. This adaptable silicone strainer seamlessly fits a wide range of drain outlets, safeguarding your pipes from blockages in various settings.

Resistant to Mold and Mildew Growth: Made from superior, mold-repellent silicone, our drain covers offer exceptional ease of cleaning, resilience, and flexibility. They effectively hinder the accumulation of bacteria, mold, and mildew, maintaining a hygienic environment in your drains and piping.

Secure Attachment & User-Friendly: Equipped with 5 robust suction cups for a steadfast, non-slip grip on damp surfaces, these drain covers guarantee effortless operation. Simply apply pressure to capture hair and debris without hindering water flow, making them ideal for everyday applications.

Premium Silicone Sink Strainers: Presenting a set of 6 robust, premium-quality drain catchers in an array of colors including Pink, White, Blue, Grey, Light Green, and Light Blue. These strainers are impeccable for averting clogs in kitchens, bathrooms, showers, and bathtubs by efficiently trapping hair, food particles, and residues.

Compact & Ideal for Travel: Measuring 14cm x 14cm, these drain strainers are portable and ideal for traveling. Their lightweight design and ease of packing make them indispensable for on-the-go washing in bathrooms, kitchens, and laundry areas.
description: Specifications: Shape: Star Assorted Colours: Blue, White, Grey, Light Pink, Light Blue, Green Material: Silicone Size: 14cm (Diameter) Thickness: 0.126 cm Quantity: 6 Features: 1. Crafted for durability, flexibility, and repeated use, this design excels in performance. 2. The star-shaped design ensures comprehensive drain coverage. It safeguards against blockages in sinks, showers, and bathtubs. 3. Tiny, strategically placed holes capture hair and debris efficiently. Powerful suction cups anchor it firmly in place. Installation, removal, and cleaning are straightforward processes. 4. Constructed from a soft, eco-conscious, and lightweight material. Heat-resistant qualities promise enduring functionality. Compatible with the majority of standard sink and bathtub drains. The non-deformable material guarantees long-lasting durability. 5. Designed for rapid water flow, even under pressure. Perfect for use in bathrooms, kitchens, and laundry areas. 6. It effectively filters out residue, contributing to a cleaner living space. Reusable and straightforward to maintain over extended periods.
